## IMQLock.acquire() method

Acquires a lock for a given key.

**Signature:**

```typescript
static acquire<T>(key: string, callback?: (...args: any[]) => any, metadata?: IMQLockMetadataItem): Promise<AcquiredLock<T>>;
```
